title: ThorHammerV1
description: Thor's hammer in Minecraft. Cool new blocks, items, and commands are added into the game
body:
**This mod adds Thor's Hammer into minecraft!**
# Features:
- Use the ```/rage``` command to activate Asgardian rage. You receive enhanced Strength, Speed, and Jump Height. You might feel queasy afterwards, though.
- You can use the _Mjolnir_ weapon in-game to bring down lightning anywhere you look by right-clicking. When you right-click while wielding Mjolnir, a lightning bolt strikes the area you are looking at. You can repeat this as many times as you want after waiting for a brief cooldown.
- A new block called the _Block of Uru_ is now in the game. Uru is a mythical Asgardian metal. It can be used to craft _Mjolnir_ by placing one _Block of Uru_ on top of a breeze rod in a crafting menu. The _Block of Uru_ can be crafted with 9 _Uru_ in a crafting table. The _Block of Uru_ has extremely high blast resistance and can withstand explosions.
- _Uru_ has also been added to the game. Uru is a mythical metal, and it can be used to craft the _Block of Uru_
This mod was created for Minecraft version **1.21.11
